name: mcp-memory-graphdb
description: Persistent LLM memory backed by a DuckDB graph database. Stores nodes, edges and relationships that survive across sessions.

tools.name: add_node
tools.description: Add a new node to the graph.

tools.name: update_node
tools.description: Update labels and/or properties of a node.

tools.name: delete_node
tools.description: Delete a node and all its edges.

tools.name: get_node
tools.description: Fetch a single node by ID.

tools.name: add_edge
tools.description: Add a directed edge between two nodes.

tools.name: list_edges
tools.description: List edges, optionally filtered by source, target or type.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search nodes by text inside properties.

tools.name: get_schema
tools.description: Return the current schema as YAML, including its revision number.

tools.name: apply_schema
tools.description: Apply additions, renames or removals to the schema.

tools.name: dreaming
tools.description: Get a paginated batch of nodes with their immediate edges, for guided cleanup.

tools.name: bootstrap
tools.description: Load identity, user context and working rules at session start.

db_name.title: Database name or path
db_name.description: Name of the memory database (e.g. 'work' → work.duckdb) or an absolute path. Leave empty for default.
